title: SimpleEconomy - Enderman Bank
description: Simple Economy mod.  Player Shops, Cash, Debit Card, ATM.
body:
SimpleEconomy is a basic economy mod that can be used to make your server more immersive!

- Adds an ATM to withdraw/deposit money to your account.
- Adds Player Shops for players to sell whatever items they want!
- Adds Wallets for players to carry their money, and debit card in.
- Adds a Debit Card to automatically transfer funds from account!
